experiences.title: Front End Developer/IT Specialist
points: Independently constructed a Graphical User Interface from the ground up using Python’s Tkinter library to integrate existing hydrology scripts into a cohesive experience, improving usability and workflow
Facilitated biweekly meetings with the client to demo new interface updates, gather feedback, and implement enhancements ensuring alignment with user requirements and preferences

Established the branch’s first Windows bare metal server, hosting two VMs configured to multiple networks to manage local phone and door operations, optimizing server resources and reducing server footprint

experiences.title: Web Developer
points: Played a key role in the company’s early-stage development, contributing to the creation of scalable web applications in a dynamic startup environment
Developed and implemented multiple pages, including class overview and assignments for a teacher dashboard using React, providing comprehensive analytics to support classroom teaching
Designed the SQL database structure and formulated REST API queries to retrieve data for dashboard integration

experiences.title: CS 124 Course Associate
points: Created detailed course content including code solutions, logic explanations and lesson videos for both Java and Kotlin sections of CS 124
Provided personalized tutoring to students through office hours and the course forum, addressing questions and clarifying concepts
Organized and led weekly quiz preparation and Even More Practice sessions for over 300 students across both Java and Kotlin sections

projects.name: Personal Website 🖼
projects.description: Everything you see on this website was handcrafted by yours truly 🙂‍↕️ I was determined to build this website without any frameworks to display my HTML, CSS and vanilla JS skills 🍦

projects.name: WhoDis? 🎭
projects.description: An anonymous chatting application where users are placed in random chat rooms within their friends, aiming to guess each other’s identities before the time runs out!

projects.name: Upmeet 📆
projects.description: A simple application to find and manage local events. Features interactive event cards with favoriting functionality

projects.name: Study Buddy 📚
projects.description: Connects college students for study sessions, sharing posts and accessing course discussions on Reddit

projects.name: Connecting Flights 🛫
projects.description: Applied graph data structures and Dijkstra’s algorithm to compute and visualize the shortest path from a selected airport to all others worldwide
